description_long: This is a large, detached suburban house surrounded by a manicured lawn and enclosed by a low fence. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with a mix of hip and gable elements, and the exterior is finished in light-colored siding with brick or stone accents. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch, decorative columns, and a double garage. Multiple windows of varying sizes are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and French doors opening to the backyard. The landscaping includes trimmed hedges, flower beds, and small trees, enhancing the curb appeal. The backyard is spacious and open, with a patio area and additional garden features.
description: A large, multi-gabled suburban house with a covered porch, double garage, and landscaped yard, featuring light siding and brick accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, double garage, and detailed landscaping along the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a long hedge running along the property boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, French doors, a patio area, and an expansive backyard lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional garden beds, side entry, and more of the backyard visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of Traditional and Modern suburban)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and French doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with decorative columns, steps, and a prominent front door flanked by landscaping
